_comment: Sample fleet config for can-telemetry-forge. Any subset of keys overrides the bundled default fleet (see src/can_telemetry_forge/config.py). Regions are a FICTIONAL operator with public-grounded climate/terrain constants traced in docs/DATA_DESIGN.md §6 — never real data. This file reproduces the bundled default at a smaller, browsable scale. anomaly_rates maps each labeled defect type (ADR-016) to its rate; any subset merges onto the defaults.
